text:
The method was simple, the witness reliable, yet the investigation refused to end. As the firm's accountant, I had to administer the audit of accrued interest dating back to a contract signed in 200 B.C. — well, not literally, though it felt that old. My responsibility was to mitigate any error before the arbitration began.

On a normal June morning I opened the cupboard where the casting ledgers were kept. The records, groundless rumor aside, showed nothing wrong. But a single bell of doubt rang in my mind. Occasionally a sovereign client will flaunt his wealth and provoke suspicion, and this maritime shipping magnate, a prolific republican donor with a din of opinions, was no exception. His production figures looked too clean.

I am proficient enough with numbers to know when a sum is wrong. Under the explanatory notes for the fifth quarter, the supplement to the revision did not add up. Was someone trying to defraud the partake of profits? I would not coax the data; I let it speak. The arithmetic, after some hesitation, revealed a missing allotment — a refund that had never reached the cattle ranchers in Sweden.

My supervisor, an admirable man of great ingenuity, was acquainted with the family. He had a foible for melancholy silence and a courteous manner, but he was no fool. 'Demolish the false entries,' he said, 'and rebuild from the source.' His assurance gave me confidence. We would not block the truth, nor whitewash a wrong.

The scientist we hired to verify the casting alloys confirmed that infertile soil samples had been used to corrode the evidence — a bizarre detail. Meanwhile, the overwrought office grew tense. One clerk, hoarse from arguing, scratched at his eyebrow and muttered about the sophistication of the fraud. Another, fond of drama, threatened to stop work entirely.

By Sunday I had worked overnight more than once, surviving on cigar smoke and weak tea served by a forgetful milkman's leftover delivery. My eyes ached; I could barely succeed in reading the spectacle of figures before me. Yet greed had made the criminals careless. An ignorant assistant had left a stapler clipped to a page that proved the valuation was a lie.

The arrival of the auditors sealed the case. The pier-side warehouse, the turkey-farm subsidiary, the suburbia office — every block of the empire was scrupulous in appearance and rotten beneath. We would not be eligible for praise; we simply did our duty. The occupational pride of an honest accountant is a quiet thing. Anybody can chase fame, but to contribute to justice, to refuse the innovation of clever lies, to muse on the circumference of a man's character and find it sound — that is the real revision worth making. The pope of finance had fallen, and the virile machinery of law, courteous yet firm, took over.

In the end, the rule I followed was virtually a script I knew by heart: trust the numbers, take nothing as acceptable until checked twice. A foreign guest at the hearing spoke with a heavy accent about the old days of colonialism, when ledgers were salted with bribes; I made a quick scratch in my margin to note it. Under close supervision, even the magnate's lawyer had to audition his excuses before a skeptical panel, and not one of them held. The salt of honest doubt had preserved the truth.
translation:
方法很简单,证人很可靠,然而调查却拒绝结束。作为公司的会计,我必须主持对一份据说签于公元前200年合同的应计利息审计——好吧,不是字面意义上的,尽管感觉那么久远。我的责任是在仲裁开始前减轻任何错误。

在一个寻常的六月早晨,我打开了存放铸件账簿的橱柜。撇开毫无根据的传言,记录显示一切无误。但我心中响起一记疑虑的钟声。偶尔会有一位至高无上的客户炫耀财富、引发怀疑,而这位海运巨头——一位多产的共和党捐助者,意见喧嚣不休——也不例外。他的产量数字看起来太干净了。

我对数字足够精通,知道一笔账何时算错。在第五季度的解释性附注下,修订的补充部分对不上。是否有人企图骗取利润的分配?我不会去哄骗数据;我让它自己说话。经过一番犹豫,算术揭示了一笔缺失的拨款——一笔从未抵达瑞典养牛人手中的退款。

我的主管是个令人钦佩、极具创造力的人,与那个家族相识。他有偏爱忧郁沉默的怪癖和彬彬有礼的举止,但他绝非傻瓜。'拆掉那些虚假分录,'他说,'从源头重建。'他的保证给了我信心。我们不会阻挡真相,也不会粉饰错误。

我们雇来核验铸件合金的科学家证实,贫瘠的土壤样本曾被用来腐蚀证据——一个离奇的细节。与此同时,过度紧张的办公室气氛变得绷紧。一名职员争论得嗓子嘶哑,抓着眉毛,嘟囔着这桩骗局的精巧。另一名偏爱戏剧性的人,威胁要彻底停工。

到星期日,我已不止一次通宵工作,靠雪茄烟和一个健忘送奶工剩下投递的淡茶撑着。我的眼睛发痛;我几乎无法成功读完眼前那一大堆数字的景象。然而贪婪使罪犯们大意了。一个无知的助手把一只订书机别在了一页上,而那一页证明了估值是个谎言。

审计员的到来使案件尘埃落定。码头边的仓库、火鸡农场子公司、郊区办公室——这帝国的每一块在表面上都一丝不苟,底下却腐烂不堪。我们不会有资格获得赞誉;我们只是尽了本分。一个诚实会计的职业自豪是安静的东西。任何人都能追逐名声,但要为正义作出贡献、拒绝聪明谎言的创新、思索一个人品格的周长并发现它牢固——这才是真正值得做的修订。金融的教皇倒下了,而法律那刚健的机器,礼貌却坚定地,接管了一切。
